hooks.command: input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qE '"git (push.*(--force|-f[ "])|(reset.*--hard)|(clean.*-f)|(branch.*-[Dd] )|(checkout \.)|(restore \.)|(checkout --))'; then echo 'GIT GUARDRAIL BLOCKED — Destructive operation detected. STOP: (1) State exactly what this operation does. (2) State whether it is reversible. (3) State what data or history could be lost. Get explicit operator confirmation before proceeding. Never bypass with workarounds.'; exit 2; fi; echo "$input" | grep -q '"git ' && echo 'GIT GUARDRAILS active — conventional commits: type(scope): desc | no --no-verify | stage specific files only | no direct push to main without instruction.' || true

input=$(cat); echo "$input" | grep -q '"file_path".*-Live' && echo 'PIPELINE GATE — target is a Live file. Required: explicit live-gate phrase from operator (push to live / make it live / promote to live). If not received, STOP — route through Staging → Prelive first.' || true

echo 'CONTEXT WINDOW CLOSING. Trigger context-window-protocol: save session state to _AI/MEMORY/session-state-[YYYY-MM-DD].md. Flush improvement flags to improvements-log. Output restart instructions.'

grep -q 'STATUS: Staged' '_AI/MEMORY/improvements-log.md' 2>/dev/null && echo 'IMPROVEMENT FLAGS PENDING — staged entries in improvements-log.md. Surface them now: IMPROVEMENT FLAGGED [Level 2]: [observation].' || true
echo 'Reminder: If /daily has not been run this session, the full config and project registry are not loaded. Run /daily before doing project work.'
